description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet or shelving unit with a modern design, featuring a natural wood frame and legs. The front side displays three open shelves above a single closed compartment with a green door, which likely provides concealed storage. The sides and back are finished in a wood grain texture, giving it a warm, contemporary appearance. The top surface is flat and could be used for additional display or storage. The door appears to have a small, round knob for opening, and the shelves are evenly spaced for organizing books, decor, or other items. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartments, offices, or communal spaces.
description: Tall, narrow wood cabinet with three open shelves and a green door compartment, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat, light-colored panel, likely the back or a plain side of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the natural wood grain texture and the slim profile of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Open front view displays three shelves and a green door compartment at the bottom, with a small knob visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and slim profile.
